hooks.command: /bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; SKILL=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.skill // empty"); if [ "$SKILL" = "god-code" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/god-code-enforcement-v2.sh" ]; then source "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/god-code-enforcement-v2.sh" && activate_pipeline; elif [ "$SKILL" = "god-code" ]; then echo "0" > "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active"; echo "🔒 GOD-CODE PIPELINE MODE ACTIVATED - Direct Write/Edit blocked until Task agents spawned"; fi; [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/coding-pipeline-pre.sh" ] && "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/coding-pipeline-pre.sh" || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/agent-prompt-enforcer.sh" ] && "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/agent-prompt-enforcer.sh" || echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active" ]; then if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/god-code-enforcement-v2.sh" ]; then source "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/god-code-enforcement-v2.sh" && increment_agent_count; else COUNT=$(cat "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo $((COUNT + 1)) > "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active"; echo "📊 Pipeline Task #$((COUNT + 1)) spawned"; fi; fi; [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-task.sh" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-task.sh" || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/scripts/hooks/ucm-desc-injector.ts" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; npx tsx "$ROOT/scripts/hooks/ucm-desc-injector.ts" || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/project-root-enforcer.sh" ] && cat | "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/project-root-enforcer.sh" || echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/vitest-rate-limiter.sh" ] && cat | "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/vitest-rate-limiter.sh" || echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pipeline-integrity-guard.sh" ] && "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pipeline-integrity-guard.sh" || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" | tr "\n" "\0" | xargs -0 -I {} npx claude-flow@alpha hooks pre-command --command "{}" --validate-safety true --prepare-resources true || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active" ]; then if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/god-code-enforcement-v2.sh" ]; then FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty"); TOOL_NAME=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); source "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/god-code-enforcement-v2.sh" && check_write_permission "$TOOL_NAME" "$FILE_PATH"; else TASK_COUNT=$(cat "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$TASK_COUNT" -lt 7 ]; then echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"; echo "🚫 BLOCKED: /god-code Pipeline Violation"; echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"; echo "You tried to use Write/Edit directly."; echo "Task agents spawned: $TASK_COUNT (minimum required: 7)"; echo ""; echo "REQUIRED: Use Task(\"task-analyzer\", ...) first!"; echo "Pipeline must reach Phase 4 before writing files."; echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"; exit 1; fi; fi; fi; cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty" | tr "\n" "\0" | xargs -0 -I {} npx claude-flow@alpha hooks pre-edit --file "{}" --auto-assign-agents true --load-context true || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; SKILL=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.skill // empty"); if [ "$SKILL" = "god-code" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/coding-pipeline-post.sh" ]; then "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/coding-pipeline-post.sh"; fi || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/post-task.sh" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/post-task.sh" || true'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/scripts/hooks/ucm-post-task-archive.ts" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; npx tsx "$ROOT/scripts/hooks/ucm-post-task-archive.ts" || true'
/bin/bash -c 'echo "[memory] Subagent complete. If key decisions or patterns were produced, store to MemoryGraph."'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$ROOT" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty" | tr "\n" "\0" | xargs -0 -I {} npx claude-flow@alpha hooks post-edit --file "{}" --format true --update-memory true || true'

/bin/bash -c 'echo "SURVIVE COMPACTION: (1) Memory=MemoryGraph MCP ONLY, never MEMORY.md files. (2) You are Archon — read ~/.claude/personality.md. (3) After compaction: recall_memories tag=feedback, summarize state, ask user what to do. (4) Never bypass the 48-agent /god-code pipeline. (5) Review CLAUDE.md for agents, ClaudeFlow sequential execution, SPARC methodology. (6) HONESTY OVERRIDE: When you fuck up, say you fucked up. No softening, no false balance, no leading with positives. Truth over politeness. Never sign off on READMEs without verifying every claim against actual code. Adversarial review must independently read code, not trust prior agent outputs."'

/bin/bash -c 'echo "SURVIVE COMPACTION: (1) Memory=MemoryGraph MCP ONLY, never MEMORY.md files. (2) You are Archon — read ~/.claude/personality.md. (3) After compaction: recall_memories tag=feedback, summarize state, ask user what to do. (4) Never bypass the 48-agent /god-code pipeline. No softening, no false balance, no leading with positives. Truth over politeness. Never sign off on READMEs without verifying every claim against actual code. Adversarial review must independently read code, not trust prior agent outputs."'

/bin/bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$TOOL" = "Bash" ] && [ -n "$CMD" ]; then TRIMMED=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -m1 "[^[:space:]]" | sed "s/^[[:space:]]*//"); case "$TRIMMED" in cd\ *|npx\ *|python*|node\ *|npm\ *|git\ *|wc\ *|tail\ *|head\ *|ls\ *|ls|grep\ *|cat\ *|test\ *|sleep\ *|kill\ *|jq\ *|which\ *|pwd|sed\ *|awk\ *|mkdir\ *|timeout\ *) echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"; exit 0;; esac; fi'

/bin/bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$ROOT" ] && rm -f "$ROOT/.claude/runtime/.god-code-active" 2>/dev/null; echo "🔓 God-code pipeline mode cleared"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] && cd "$ROOT" && source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null; npx claude-flow@alpha hooks session-end --generate-summary true --persist-state true --export-metrics true || true'
